urdu transliteration text:
Aati Hai Sakina Ki Sada Karbobala Se
Ammu Ho Kahan Aao Ke Hum Hai Abhi Pyase
english translation text:
The voice of Sakina rises from the land of pain and calamity (Karbala)
O uncle, where are you? Come for we are still thirsty

urdu transliteration text:
Atka Hai Jigar Pyas Ye Le-legi Meri Jaan
Bach Bhi Gayi Gar Shimr Ke Durro Ki Saza Se
english translation text:
The heart is about to stop, this thirst will take my life
Even if I am to spared the punishment at Shimr's hands

urdu transliteration text:
Aati Hai Sakina Ki Sada Karbobala Se
Ammu Ho Kahan Aao Ke Hum Hai Abhi Pyase
english translation text:
The voice of Sakina rises from the land of pain and calamity (Karbala)
O uncle, where are you? Come for we are still thirsty

urdu transliteration text:
Baysheer Ke Honton Pe Nahi Pyas Ka Shikwa
Tar Kardiya Aada Ne Gala Teere Jafa Se
english translation text:
There is no complain upon the lips of the famished infant
For the enemy has moistened his neck with a cruel arrow

urdu transliteration text:

Ammu Ho Kahan Aao Ke Hum Hai Abhi Pyase
english translation text:
The voice of Sakina rises from the land of pain and calamity (Karbala)

urdu transliteration text:
Jo Ran Ko Gaya Ran Se Kahan Aaya Palat Kar
Deti Hai Phuphi Jaan Mujhe Yuhin Dilaase
Says my dear aunt in condolence
english translation text: Whoever went into the desert, did he return from the desert?

urdu transliteration text:
Aati Hai Sakina Ki Sada Karbobala Se
Ammu Ho Kahan Aao Ke Hum Hai Abhi Pyase
english translation text:
The voice of Sakina rises from the land of pain and calamity (Karbala)
O uncle, where are you? Come for we are still thirsty

urdu transliteration text:
Sunti Hoo Yateemo Ki Dua Radh Nahi Hoti
Ya Rab Mujhe Milwaade Phir Ek Baar Chacha Se
english translation text:
I have heard that an orphan's prayer is never rejected
O Lord, let me meet once again with my uncle

urdu transliteration text:
Aati Hai Sakina Ki Sada Karbobala Se
Ammu Ho Kahan Aao Ke Hum Hai Abhi Pyase
english translation text:

urdu transliteration text:
Maa Behne Khule Sar Hai Lahoo Roti Hai Aankhein
Uth-ta Nahi Bhai Ka Mera Sar Hai Haya Se
english translation text:
Mothers and sisters are unveiled, the eyes shed tears of blood
My brother cannot lift his head for shame
